triggers.name: acute
triggers.description: High tone mark. Type ´ then a vowel to produce an acute-accented character (e.g. ´ + a = á).

triggers.name: grave
triggers.description: Low tone mark. Type ` then a vowel to produce a grave-accented character (e.g. ` + a = à).

triggers.name: tilde
triggers.description: Nasal mark. Type ~ then a vowel to produce a nasalised character (e.g. ~ + a = ã). Used in Fon/Adja.
